And no… this is not another post telling you to “keep applying everywhere and hope someone replies.” 🙂  Here’s something different.  10 freshers who want to learn Social Media Marketing and compete for a work-from-home internship. Throughout the program, participants will work on practical assignments, real social media tasks, and learn the skills required to actually manage and grow accounts.  At the end of the program, one top performer will be selected for a Social Media Marketing Internship with a ₹6000/month stipend.
